description_long: This is a modern, dark wood-finished cabinet or entertainment shelf with a rectangular profile and a raised top surface supported by metallic cylindrical posts. The front features three open shelves in the center, flanked by two larger open compartments on either side, providing ample storage for electronics, books, or decorative items. The top surface is wide and flat, suitable for placing a television or other large objects. The sides are solid panels, and the base is supported by small, round feet, likely made of plastic or metal. The interior is open and accessible, with no visible doors or drawers, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, making it suitable for urban living rooms, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A dark wood-finished, open-shelved cabinet with a raised top supported by metal posts and multiple storage compartments. Its sleek, modern design is ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing three central open shelves and two larger side compartments, with the raised top surface clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid panel side and the raised top supported by metal posts, with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the full layout of the open shelves and compartments, as well as the supporting posts beneath the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and the raised top structure.
